skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered short video generation skill. Creates 5-120 second videos from text prompts and uploaded media. Supports product ads, social content, brand videos, and explainers with multiple aspect ratios.
skill.summary: Professional AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music. Users provide requests; Pexo handles all creative production.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 492 patterns across 11 files (1910 lines), but all findings are FALSE POSITIVES for a legitimate API client skill. External commands are standard bash patterns with hardcoded/validated arguments. Network calls go to documented pexo.ai endpoints. Filesystem access uses standard config locations (~/.pexo/config) with proper temp file cleanup. Environment variable access (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL) is expected for API authentication. No prompt injection, credential exfiltration, or command injection vulnerabilities detected.

low_findings.title: API Key Storage in Local Config
low_findings.description: API credentials stored in ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard practice for CLI tools but users should ensure proper file permissions.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file pattern is well-documented and expected for CLI authentication. Low risk if file permissions are set correctly.

low_findings.title: External API Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill requires network connectivity to pexo.ai servers. Production depends on external service availability.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Documented dependency on pexo.ai API. Network calls are to legitimate endpoints with proper HTTPS.

low_findings.title: Shell Script Execution
low_findings.description: Skill consists of bash scripts that execute system commands. All command arguments are hardcoded or properly validated before use.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Shell scripts use $(...) substitution with validated inputs. No user input injection vectors found in command arguments.

content.user_title: Create AI-Powered Short Videos from Text Prompts
content.value_statement: Transform your video ideas into professional 5-120 second videos without creative expertise. Pexo handles scriptwriting, composition, transitions, and music while you focus on your vision.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text descriptions
Support multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Process uploaded images, videos, and audio as reference materials
Handle creative decisions including scriptwriting, shot composition, and music selection
Provide preview options for user selection before final rendering
Support revision requests using existing project context
limitations: Requires valid Pexo API key and account at pexo.ai
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos
Cannot crawl or process URLs - files must be uploaded directly
Maximum video length is 120 seconds per output

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create engaging product showcase videos for online stores. Upload product images and describe the desired style; Pexo generates professional ads with transitions and music.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Produce TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content from simple text prompts. Ideal for creators who need consistent video output without editing skills.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Brand Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Generate quick explainer videos for products, services, or concepts. Upload brand assets and provide key messaging; receive polished videos ready for distribution.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video (Beginner)
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second product video for my running shoes. I've uploaded the product photo. Style should be energetic and modern for Instagram.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a simple product showcase video with uploaded image

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Clip (Intermediate)
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 30-second vertical video for TikTok about our new coffee shop. Use warm colors, show the cozy atmosphere, and include text overlays for our menu highlights. I'm uploading our interior photos.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs platform-specific content with multiple reference images

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video (Advanced)
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second brand story video for our sustainable fashion company. Show the journey from raw materials to finished products. Emphasize eco-friendly processes and ethical manufacturing. I'm uploading fabric samples, workshop photos, and our logo.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex narrative video with multiple assets and specific messaging requirements

prompt_templates.title: Revision Request (All Levels)
prompt_templates.prompt: The video looks great but can you make it 10 seconds shorter and use a more upbeat music track? Also, add our website URL at the end.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to modify an existing video with specific change requests

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second video showcasing my handmade jewelry collection. I want elegant, soft lighting. Uploading 5 product photos.
output: Final video delivered with download URL

output_examples.input: Make a vertical 9:16 video for Instagram Reels about our cooking class. Show happy students learning to cook. Uploading classroom photos.
output: Project created with vertical aspect ratio
Download link and project page provided

best_practices: Provide specific details about desired style, mood, and target platform in your initial prompt to reduce revision cycles
Upload high-quality reference images (JPG, PNG, WEBP) for better video results
Wait the full 15-20 minutes for video generation - polling too frequently wastes API credits
Use the same project ID when requesting revisions to maintain context
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user didn't specify - let Pexo's AI make professional decisions
Do not call chat endpoints during WAIT state - only poll with project-get to avoid duplicate video production
Do not send bare asset IDs in messages - always wrap in proper tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image>
Do not expect URL crawling - download files first, then upload them to Pexo

faq.question: How long does it take to generate a video?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-30 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time. The skill will poll for status and notify you when complete.

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC. Maximum file size depends on your Pexo plan.

faq.question: Can I modify a video after it's generated?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send revision requests like 'make it shorter' or 'change the music'. Pexo maintains project context for efficient revisions.

faq.question: Do I need a Pexo account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a valid Pexo API key from pexo.ai. Set up your account, generate an API key, and configure it in ~/.pexo/config before using this skill.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Three aspect ratios: 16:9 (widescreen for YouTube), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (square for Instagram posts). Pexo can auto-select based on your target platform.

faq.question: Can Pexo process video URLs from YouTube or other sites?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl external URLs. Download the video file first, then upload it using the upload script. The skill will guide you through this process.
